mode.title: Mode
mode.description: save-session: open SIXT for interactive manual login via Live View, then store cookies. scan: load the saved session and scan rates.

liveViewMinutes.title: Live View login window (minutes)
liveViewMinutes.description: save-session only. How long the browser stays open for you to log in before the session is saved.

liveViewPassword.title: Live View password (optional)
liveViewPassword.description: save-session only. If set, noVNC requires this password before showing the browser. Recommended for privacy.

liveViewWidth.title: Live View width
liveViewWidth.description: Browser Live View width in pixels for manual SIXT login.

liveViewHeight.title: Live View height
liveViewHeight.description: Browser Live View height in pixels for manual SIXT login.

loginSession.title: SIXT login session (Playwright storageState)
loginSession.description: scan only. Optional. If provided, this is used instead of the saved SIXT_SESSION. Normally leave empty and rely on save-session.

pickupLocation.title: Pickup location
pickupLocation.description: SIXT pickup location code or text, for example LAX.

dropoffLocation.title: Dropoff location
dropoffLocation.description: SIXT dropoff location code or text, for example LAX.

preferredMakes.title: Preferred makes
preferredMakes.description: Vehicle makes to prioritize when reading visible offer text.

vehicleClasses.title: Vehicle classes to keep
vehicleClasses.description: Rental vehicle classes/categories to keep in results.

minDays.title: Minimum rental length (days)
minDays.description: Minimum rental length in days for generated searches.

maxDays.title: Maximum rental length (days)
maxDays.description: Maximum rental length in days for generated searches. Keep under 28 for normal rentals.

pickupTimes.title: Pickup/return times (24h HH:mm)
pickupTimes.description: Pickup and return time slots in 24-hour HH:mm format.

dateWindowStart.title: Pickup date window start (YYYY-MM-DD)
dateWindowStart.description: First pickup date to scan in YYYY-MM-DD format.

dateWindowEnd.title: Pickup date window end (YYYY-MM-DD)
dateWindowEnd.description: Last pickup date to scan in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ingestUrl.title: v0 ingest endpoint URL
ingestUrl.description: scan only. Results are POSTed here with header x-scanner-secret. Leave empty to use only the dataset.

scannerSecret.title: Scanner secret
scannerSecret.description: Sent as the x-scanner-secret header (and in the body) to the ingest endpoint.

sixtBaseUrl.title: SIXT base URL
sixtBaseUrl.description: Base SIXT website URL to open for login or scanning. Use https://www.sixt.co.uk/ for UK corporate login.

searchUrlTemplate.title: Search results URL template (recommended for cloud)

dateStepDays.title: Step between pickup dates (days)
dateStepDays.description: How many days to skip between pickup dates while scanning.

dayStep.title: Step between rental lengths (days)
dayStep.description: How many days to step between rental lengths.

testRunOnly.title: Test run only (one search first)
testRunOnly.description: scan only. When true, runs ONLY the first combination and stops.

maxSearches.title: Safety cap on number of searches
maxSearches.description: Safety limit for maximum search combinations in one run.

minDelayMs.title: Minimum delay between searches (ms)
minDelayMs.description: Minimum delay between searches in milliseconds.

maxDelayMs.title: Maximum delay between searches (ms)
maxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay between searches in milliseconds.

postBatchSize.title: Ingest POST batch size
postBatchSize.description: How many deals to send per POST request to the v0 ingest endpoint.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: scan only. Residential proxy recommended to reduce bot challenges. Never bypasses CAPTCHA.

baseUrl.title: Base URL alias
baseUrl.description: Optional alias for SIXT base URL. Use https://www.sixt.co.uk/ for UK.
